subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the ninth of February 1912, sent through the esteemed Shaykh Farajullah, was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مرسول بتاریخ نهم ۹ فبرایر ۱۹۱۲ بواسطه جناب شیخ فرج الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
